functions.name: InterviewPanel
params:
{
  interviews,
  onStartInterview,
  onViewInterview,
  onExportInterview,
  onDeleteInterview,
  exporting,
  loadingInterview
}

functions.name: InterviewItemCard
params:
{
  interview,
  index,
  total,
  exporting,
  deleting,
  onView,
  onExport,
  onDelete
}

callGraph.callee:
interviews
      .filter(i => i.overallScore !== null)
      .map((interview) => ({
        name: formatDateOnly(interview.createdAt),
        score: interview.overallScore || 0,
        index: interviews.length - interviews.indexOf(interview)
      }))
      .reverse

functions.name: InterviewFormModal
params:
{
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  onSubmit,
  onDelete,
  initialData,
  mode,
}

functions.name: ScheduleCalendar
params:
{
  interviews = [],
  onSelectEvent,
  view,
  onViewChange,
  date,
  onDateChange,
  onEventDrop,
  onEventResize,
}

callGraph.callee:
[
              { key: 'day', icon: Calendar, label: '日视图' },
              { key: 'week', icon: Calendar, label: '周视图' },
              { key: 'month', icon: LayoutGrid, label: '月视图' },
              { key: 'list', icon: List, label: '列表' },
            ].map

functions.name: ScoreProgressBar
params:
{

  score,
  maxScore,
  color = 'bg-primary-500',
  delay = 0,
  className = ''
}

  isOpen,

  startButtonText = '开始面试',
}
